content:
✨ polaris | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a self-hosted, personal music streaming service accessible from any device.
✨ Key Features: • Self-hosted music streaming server • Support for large music collections (100,000+ songs) • Beautiful and customizable user interface with dark mode • Cross-platform compatibility (Windows, Linux, BSD, Docker) • Support for various audio file formats (flac, mp3, ogg, opus, etc.)
📖 Summary: Polaris is a self-hosted, open-source music streaming server designed for exceptional performance and ease of use. It allows users to access their entire music collection from any device, supporting large libraries and offering a beautiful, customizable user interface.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 dlman | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Accelerating and managing file downloads across multiple platforms with enhanced reliability and control.
✨ Key Features: • Multi-segment parallel downloads (1–32 segments per file) • Crash-safe persistence with SQLite • Pause and resume anytime • Auto-resume after crashes or restarts • Scheduling & Automation (start/stop times, post-download actions)
📖 Summary: DLMan is a free, open-source download manager for Windows, macOS, and Linux, built with Rust and Tauri for speed and reliability. It offers advanced features like multi-segment downloads, crash-safe persistence with SQLite, scheduling, and organization tools.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🌟 PDF_Shield | Tcl
🎯 Primary Use Case: Detecting and preventing DoS and embedded JavaScript attacks within PDF files.
✨ Key Features: • Automated PDF Monitoring • Drag & Drop scanning • Customizable Alerts (JS, infinite loops, zip bombs) • Extensible plugin architecture • User-Friendly Interface (CLI & GUI)
📖 Summary: PDF_Shield is a Python-based security tool designed to detect and prevent Denial of Service (DoS) attacks and embedded JavaScript threats within PDF files. It offers automated monitoring, customizable alerts, and a user-friendly interface to safeguard against malicious PDF content, particularly targeting PDF engines in browsers.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
